item.title: AI tools
item.description: AI will not replace designers and developers; they will be replaced by those who use AI.

item.title: Color and textures
item.description: There are loads of cool tools for designers on the web, and we all have our go-to tools for working with color and textures. Here are my favs.

item.title: Design books
item.description: Some books about designing or related to designing.

item.title: Design courses
item.description: No profession can be mastered in a few months. It’s better to make learning a habit.

item.title: Design tools
item.description: A collection of modern design tools. Prototyping Frame0 — Make hand-drawn style wireframes quickly and easily.

item.title: Typography
item.description: A curated collection of my favorite typefaces, font foundries, and typography tools.

item.title: Andrii Loginov Garden
item.description: Greetings, traveler 🗿 If you found these gems useful, well… yay for us both! Categories 🎨 Design AI tools - AI-powered tools for design and development Design tools - Animation, prototyping, mockups, 3D, and digital painting tools Color and textures - Color management, textures, and inspiration Ty...
